sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Smallcap Software Names Power Fresh Growth Stories
feed.summary: Smallcap software companies are driving growth in the technology sector through solutions in work management, cybersecurity, and supply-chain platforms. Their recurring revenue models offer resilience amidst fluctuating digital demand. The article highlights the importance of these focused software names and their contribution to market leadership trends, particularly within the NASDAQ Composite.

feed.title: James Litinsky Trust lists MP Common stock sales (MP) in multiple April–May 2026 trades
feed.summary: The James Litinsky Trust has reported proposed sales of MP Materials Corp. common stock through multiple transactions in April and May 2026, as detailed in a Form 144 SEC filing. These dispositions include sales of 234,651 shares on May 28, 2026, and 115,349 shares on May 27, 2026, among others. The filing provides specific trade dates, share counts, and listed amounts for each transaction, highlighting transparent insider activity in shares tied to Founder Stock.

feed.title: Matson senior vice president Grace Cerocke sells $220,284 stock
feed.summary: Grace M. Cerocke, Senior Vice President at Matson Inc. (MATX), sold 1,200 shares of company stock for $220,284 on May 28, 2026. This transaction leaves Ms. Cerocke with 17,986 shares, while Matson's stock shows strong year-over-year growth and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro, despite a recent Q1 2026 revenue miss.

feed.title: Is Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its 73% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has seen a significant 72.7% surge over the last year, prompting a valuation check. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is undervalued by 31.1%, its P/E ratio of 34.7x is above the industry average, indicating it might be overvalued by that metric. Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature highlights diverging investor opinions, with fair value estimates ranging from a cautious US$44.08 to an optimistic US$81.00 per share, showcasing how different assumptions about growth and risk lead to varied conclusions.

feed.title: Insider Buying: David Nelms Acquires 18,000 Shares of CDW Corp
feed.summary: David Nelms, a Director at CDW Corp, recently purchased 18,000 shares of the company, bringing his total ownership to 51,025.12 shares. This transaction occurred while CDW Corp's stock was trading at $111.43, indicating that the stock is significantly undervalued based on its GF Value of $203.10 and has a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.55. Over the past year, the company has seen two insider buys and one insider sell, with Nelms being the sole buyer of 18,000 shares.

feed.title: LendingClub (LC) legal chief sells 5,500 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: LendingClub's General Counsel and Secretary, Jordan Cheng, sold 5,500 shares of company common stock at $17.00 per share on May 28, 2026. This transaction was pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, indicating it was part of routine portfolio management rather than a discretionary trade. After the sale, Mr. Cheng still holds 113,574 shares, representing a substantial stake in LendingClub.

feed.title: LendingClub (LC: LC) CFO sells 20,000 shares in 10b5-1 stock sale
feed.summary: LendingClub CFO Andrew LaBenne sold 20,000 shares of common stock on May 28, 2026, at a weighted-average price of $17.0032 per share. This transaction was part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan designed to diversify his assets, and he now directly holds 234,955 shares. The plan allows sales of up to 7.0% of his equity interest in LendingClub, and he also indirectly holds 12,000 shares for his children.

feed.title: A Look at LendingClub Corp (LC) After 4.8% Gain -- GF Value $13.
feed.summary: LendingClub Corp (LC) shares recently gained 4.8%, but the stock is considered 28.0% overvalued at $17.85 compared to its GF Value™ of $13.95. Despite a solid GF Score™ of 75/100, driven by strong growth and momentum ranks, the company has lower profitability and financial strength ratings. Insider activity shows no recent buying, suggesting a cautious outlook from executives.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts (WYNN) director exercises 10,827 stock options at $81.55
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts director Philip G. Satre exercised 10,827 stock options at $81.55 per share, increasing his direct ownership to 33,293 common shares. He also holds 34,195 indirect common shares through a Family Trust. The transaction, filed as a Form 4, indicates a neutral filing sentiment and has a high impact.

feed.title: LKFN (LKFN) proposed sale notice: 5,900 shares via Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates a proposed sale of 5,900 shares of Lakeland Financial Corporation (LKFN) acquired on 07/19/2018. The filing, dated 05/29/2026, lists Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC as the broker-dealer and an amount of $357,653.87. This form serves as a notice of intent to sell restricted or controlled securities, not a confirmation of an executed sale.

feed.title: Kustom Entertainment enters EDM with Global Frequencies
feed.summary: Kustom Entertainment, known for its large-scale live events, is making a significant entry into the U.S. dance music scene with "Global Frequencies." This one-day EDM event on June 28, 2026, at Azura Amphitheater in Bonner Springs, Kansas, features a robust lineup including DJ Diesel, Loud Luxury, TroyBoi, Alison Wonderland, and KSHMR. The company aims to prove that demand for EDM extends beyond coastal regions and plans for "Global Frequencies" to be the first of many electronic music events nationwide.

feed.title: FiEE (NASDAQ: FIEE) registers 494,476 shares for resale by holders
feed.summary: FiEE, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIEE) has filed an S-3 resale registration for 494,476 shares of common stock to be sold by selling stockholders. The company will not receive any proceeds from these sales, and the shares may be sold through various methods. As of May 28, 2026, FiEE had 8,528,598 shares outstanding, with a last reported closing price of $5.20 per share on Nasdaq.

feed.title: Vistra (NYSE: VST) SVP and CAO sells 5,000 shares in open market
feed.summary: Vistra Corp.'s Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, Margaret Montemayor, sold 5,000 shares of company common stock at $164.96 per share on May 27, 2026. Following this open-market transaction, she directly holds 14,360 Vistra common shares. The sale, valued at approximately $824,800, is considered a routine insider sale by analysts.

feed.title: Regeneron Fell 15% Over the Past 30 Days. Here’s What to Expect in 2026
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) stock dropped 15% in the last 30 days due to investor concerns about future growth drivers and a pipeline setback in a Phase 3 melanoma study. Despite a recent earnings beat and strong Dupixent sales, the company's fianlimab and Libtayo combination failed to achieve statistical significance in its trial, leading to analyst downgrades. However, TIKR's valuation model suggests a target price of around $880, implying a 41% upside, provided Dupixent continues its strong performance, EYLEA HD executes well, and the pipeline sees new successes.

feed.title: FDA approves Afrezza for children and adolescents with diabetes
feed.summary: The FDA has approved MannKind Corp.'s Afrezza, an inhaled insulin, for children and adolescents aged 6 and older with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes. This marks the first needle-free insulin option for pediatric diabetes patients, offering a rapid-acting solution that can be dosed at the start of a meal to better accommodate variable routines. The approval was based on the INHALE-1 study, which demonstrated Afrezza's non-inferiority to daily insulin injections in glycemic control and showed reassuring pulmonary safety.

feed.title: IBUY ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:IBUY
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the Amplify Online Retail ETF (IBUY), detailing its key statistics such as assets under management, dividend yield, and expense ratio. It outlines the ETF's investment strategy, classification, and performance metrics, including recent price and NAV total returns. Additionally, the analysis breaks down IBUY's fund composition by exposure type, sector, and region, and answers frequently asked questions about its holdings, dividends, and issuing company.

feed.title: Employees rate First Horizon a Great Place to Work for 7th time
feed.summary: First Horizon (NYSE:FHN) has been recognized as a Great Place to Work-Certified™ company for the seventh consecutive time, an accolade based on an independent employee survey. The certification highlights the company's commitment to fostering a collaborative and supportive workplace environment where employees feel valued and empowered. Tanya Hart, Chief Human Resources Officer, credited the associates for their role in making this achievement possible.

feed.title: (MOTG) Price Dynamics and Execution-Aware Positioning
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed analysis of Vaneck Morningstar Global Wide Moat Etf (NASDAQ: MOTG), outlining a neutral sentiment across all time horizons with a mid-channel oscillation pattern. It presents three distinct AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—along with specific entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis highlights a significant risk-reward short setup targeting a 4.3% downside versus 0.3% risk.

feed.title: This Tesla owner won a $10k refund in court for Tesla’s FSD lies (Updated)
feed.summary: A Tesla owner successfully sued Tesla in small claims court for a $10,600 refund for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, which failed to deliver on its promises. Despite initial delays and Tesla's attempts to push back deadlines, the court ultimately ruled in the owner's favor, citing Tesla's lack of a meritorious defense and CEO Elon Musk's admission that older hardware cars would never achieve full self-driving. This case highlights a growing trend of owners seeking refunds for undelivered FSD capabilities, with similar class-action lawsuits emerging globally.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) CEO Sells $604,200.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) CEO John Farahi sold 5,000 shares of company stock for $604,200.00. This sale reduces his ownership by 0.80%, though he still holds 616,556 shares valued at approximately $74.5 million. The company recently exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.52 against a $1.15 consensus and an 8.9% increase in revenue year-over-year.

feed.title: Director trims Landmark Bancorp (LARK) stake with 4,782-share open-market sale
feed.summary: Landmark Bancorp (LARK) director Patrick L. Alexander sold a total of 4,782 shares of common stock through open-market transactions on May 28 and 29, 2026. The sales were made via an indirect trust account at prices around $28.50 per share, reducing the trust's holdings to 700 shares. Alexander still holds 70,994 direct shares and 2,304 indirect shares as custodian for grandchildren, which were not part of this sale.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions (NASDAQ:KTOS) Insider Sells 4,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions insider Stacey Rock sold 4,000 shares of the company's stock, totaling approximately $261,880, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan. Despite this insider sale and a 1.6% drop in share price, Kratos recently exceeded earnings and revenue expectations. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $96.28, and the company benefits from strong institutional ownership and potential U.S. drone-sector funding.

feed.title: Qualcomm Unveils Snapdragon C Platform for Entry-Level Laptops
feed.summary: Qualcomm has introduced its new Snapdragon C Platform, an entry-level processor designed for affordable AI PCs. This platform aims to provide responsive performance, low heat, and long battery life for notebooks priced around $300, with devices from Lenovo, HP, and Acer expected later this year. The integrated NPU will enable AI capabilities on these budget-friendly laptops, targeting students, households, and small business users.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
feed.source_domain: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media

feed.title: Northland homeowner calls for cleanup after tree trimming debris left behind
feed.summary: A Northland homeowner, Michelle Crawford, contacted KMBC 9 Investigates after a tree removal company working for Evergy left a significant amount of tree trimming debris in her yard, leading to confusion about cleanup responsibilities. After KMBC 9 Investigates got involved, Evergy agreed to remove the debris, despite it not typically being their policy, and will do so early next week. Crawford had attempted to contact Evergy and the trimming company multiple times without resolution.

feed.title: State Street ETF Closure Tests Confidence In Broader STT Valuation Story
feed.summary: State Street plans to close and liquidate its State Street DoubleLine Emerging Markets Fixed Income ETF (EMTL) in July 2026. This move prompts investors to examine State Street's ETF strategy while the company's stock (NYSE:STT) shows strong performance, up 20.6% year to date and 66.2% over the past year. The article advises investors to monitor how State Street manages its ETF range and consider minor risks like insider selling, despite the stock trading below analyst targets and an estimated fair value.

feed.title: Navigating World Cup stadiums is going to be a logistical nightmare. Here's how Uber wants to help
feed.summary: Uber is enhancing its wayfinding features, including in-app directions for airports and sports venues, to help attendees navigate the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The company is also introducing Uber Shuttle services at four U.S. venues and a Travel Pass for savings. These updates aim to address logistical challenges in large venues, a solution that could become increasingly vital for major events.

feed.title: Aurora Mobile Limited 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:JG) 2026-05-29
feed.summary: This article announces that Aurora Mobile Limited has published its slide deck in conjunction with its Q1 2026 earnings call. The content was provided by SA Transcripts, Seeking Alpha's team responsible for producing earnings call transcripts. It encourages users to enable Javascript and cookies or disable ad-blockers if they encounter issues viewing the content.

feed.title: ICON plc: FY 2025 Shows Reset Before Reacceleration
feed.summary: ICON plc reported mixed 4Q25 results with an EPS miss despite a revenue beat, indicating margin pressure and an earnings reset. FY26 guidance projects revenue between $7.85–$8.15 billion and EPS of $10.00–$11.00, reflecting near-term challenges and governance concerns due to internal control weaknesses and accounting restatements. Despite these issues, the company trades at a discount with strong bookings and backlog, suggesting a potential growth rebound in FY27.

feed.title: Quick Fix: Delta Air Lines Repairs Boeing 737-900ER Less Than 48 Hours After Engine Failure
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines Boeing 737-900ER experienced an engine failure shortly after takeoff from Philadelphia, forcing it to return to the airport. The airline quickly repaired the aircraft, N833DN, and had it back in service within 48 hours, demonstrating efficient maintenance operations. The plane has since returned to its regular flight schedule.

feed.title: Pizza Hut May Have a New Owner Soon. Yum! Brands Stock Is Rising.
feed.summary: Yum! Brands is reportedly in exclusive negotiations to sell Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital, leading to a rise in Yum! Brands' stock. This potential sale could significantly change the ownership landscape for the well-known pizza chain.

feed.title: Yum Brands in exclusive talks to sell Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital, source says
feed.summary: Yum Brands is reportedly in exclusive negotiations with private-equity firm LongRange Capital to sell its Pizza Hut chain. This potential sale comes as the fast-food industry faces challenges from demand weakness, rising inflation, and a shift towards healthier eating habits, with Pizza Hut's sales declining for ten consecutive quarters. Meanwhile, other Yum Brands, like Taco Bell and KFC, have seen consistent growth.

feed.title: Hawkins Inc (HWKN) Shares Fall 3.2% -- GF Value Says Still Overv
feed.summary: Hawkins Inc (HWKN) shares dropped 3.2% to $154.75, yet GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates the stock remains overvalued by about 15.0%. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 81/100, driven by high profitability and momentum, its P/E ratio is significantly above historical averages, suggesting caution for investors. No recent insider trading activity has been reported, further contributing to a neutral outlook from those closest to the company.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Names New Chief Commercial and Marketing Officer
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) announced that Taylor Patton will become their new chief commercial and marketing officer, effective July 1, 2026. Patton succeeds Henry Charlton, who will transition to senior vice president of global business operations. This change aims to ensure a smooth transition and support the company's continued global growth in minimally invasive care.

feed.title: Monolithic Power (NASDAQ: MPWR) EVP sells 7,565 shares at $1,700
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems' EVP & General Counsel, Saria Tseng, reported an open-market sale of 7,565 shares of Common Stock at $1,700 per share on May 27, 2026. After this transaction, Ms. Tseng directly holds 144,218 shares and indirectly holds 1,000 shares through the C&T Discovery Foundation. This sale resulted in a net divestment of $12.86 million, signaling a very high impact and negative sentiment for the filing.

feed.title: China's GAC lost $1,200 per vehicle in 2025 as Honda tie-up deadline nears
feed.summary: China's state-owned automaker Guangzhou Automobile Group (GAC) faced significant losses of $1,225 per vehicle on its own-brand models in 2025 due to fierce price competition in the electric vehicle market, struggling against rivals like BYD and Geely. The company's Aion brand, once a success, has seen declining sales as the deadline for its partnership with Honda approaches. This highlights the intense pressures on traditional automakers in China's rapidly evolving EV sector.

feed.title: HQL Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy HQL?
feed.summary: This article provides a price prediction for Abrdn Life Sciences Investors (HQL) for 2026 and beyond, analyzing various technical indicators and seasonal trends. It suggests a "Strong Sell" recommendation based on its comprehensive evaluation of technical signals, moving average trends, short sell data, and similar chart patterns. The analysis highlights that while June has the highest probability of positive returns for HQL, the overall outlook for the stock is bearish for the near future.

feed.title: Unity Software (U) CAO sells 13,247 shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Unity Software's Chief Accounting Officer, Mark Barrysmith, automatically sold 13,247 shares of common stock on May 26, 2026, at a weighted average price of $27.18 each. This "sell to cover" transaction was executed to fulfill tax withholding obligations tied to restricted stock unit vesting, not representing a discretionary trade. Following the sale, Barrysmith directly holds 370,654 shares.

feed.title: MacroGenics expands ZYNYZ royalty deal with Sagard, secures $60M upfront
feed.summary: MacroGenics has expanded its royalty agreement with Sagard, centered on its oncology drug ZYNYZ (retifanlimab-dlwr), securing an additional $60 million upfront. This new agreement builds upon their existing 2023 collaboration for multiple oncology assets. The funding will further support the commercialization of ZYNYZ and MacroGenics' broader drug development pipeline.

feed.title: 908 Devices CFO Joseph H. Griffith IV sells $62,668 in stock
feed.summary: Joseph H. Griffith IV, CFO of 908 Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:MASS), sold 6,940 shares of common stock for $62,668 at $9.03 per share on May 28, 2026, following a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in June 2025. This sale occurred despite the stock's strong year-to-date performance. The company also recently reported a 14% revenue increase in Q1 2026, though EPS missed forecasts.

feed.title: Is Eastman Chemical (EMN) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Rebound?
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical (EMN), trading at about US$75.87, appears undervalued based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, suggesting a 43.7% discount from its estimated intrinsic value of $134.73 per share. The company's P/E ratio of 21.73x is also below both the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio, indicating it trades at a discount. The article explores both bullish and bearish narratives for EMN, with fair value estimates ranging from US$67.68 to US$96.01, helping investors contextualize the stock's potential.

feed.title: A Look At MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) Valuation After Wells Fargo Upgrade And AI Demand Tailwinds
feed.summary: MSCI (MSCI) is under scrutiny after a Wells Fargo upgrade, driven by increased demand for data-driven and AI-powered investment strategies. Despite a recent surge in its stock price, analysts and valuation models present conflicting views on its fair value, with some suggesting it's overvalued while others indicate it's near fair value based on discounted cash flows. Investors are encouraged to weigh these different perspectives and consider other investment opportunities based on their financial goals.

feed.title: Okta, Inc. Stock 12‑Month Price Target Raised to $117.12, Implies 24% Upside
feed.summary: Okta, Inc.'s average price target has increased to $117.12 from $101.9, according to estimates from 40 analysts, suggesting a potential 24% upside based on the May 28 closing price. The stock retains a consensus "Buy" rating from 48 analysts, with a strong majority recommending Buy.

feed.title: PagerDuty, Inc. Stock 12‑Month Price Target Raised to $8.57, Implies 15% Upside
feed.summary: Analysts have raised the 12-month average price target for PagerDuty, Inc. (PD) stock from $8 to $8.57, with forecasts ranging from $6 to $10 per share. This updated target suggests a potential upside of approximately 15% based on the May 28 closing price. The consensus rating among 10 analysts remains "Buy," with 4 Buys, 5 Holds, and 1 Sell recommendation.

feed.title: Dow Inc. (DOW) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: Here's Why
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) shares fell by 2.93% in the latest trading session, underperforming broader market gains, including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq. The stock has depreciated 14.13% over the past month, despite positive forecasts for its upcoming financial results, which predict significant growth in EPS and revenue. Dow currently holds a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) and shows favorable valuation metrics compared to its industry.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Secures $106M Task Order for Support Services
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) has secured a $106.02 million task order for baseline sustainment and obsolescence support for the Mobile User Objective System's ground segment, with options extending to May 2031, bringing the total potential value to $294.95 million. The company's GF Score is 94/100, reflecting strong profitability and growth, and GD is currently trading at a P/E ratio of 21.83. Despite insider selling of $43 million over the past three months, the contract award positions General Dynamics strongly in the defense sector.

feed.title: Boeing (BA) Secures $200M R&D Contract for Aerospace Technologie
feed.summary: Boeing (BA) has been awarded a $200 million research and development contract from the Air Force Research Laboratory for advancements in aerodynamics and structural technologies, with work expected to be completed by May 2037. Despite this positive development, the company's P/E ratio of 112.21x indicates a high valuation, and its GF Score of 68/100 points to moderate potential long-term returns with challenges in financial strength and profitability. Insider buying activity suggests some confidence, but investors are advised to consider the mixed financial signals.

feed.title: Apple (AAPL) director Levinson sells 50,000 shares and gifts 65,000 more
feed.summary: Apple Inc. director Arthur D. Levinson reported selling 50,000 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $311.02 per share and gifting 65,000 additional shares on May 27, 2026. After these transactions, his direct holdings decreased, but he still holds 56,000 shares indirectly through his spouse. This significant insider activity has been marked with a "Very Negative" sentiment due to the net sale and gift of over 100,000 shares.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) brand president reports stock and RSU holdings
feed.summary: Jennifer Kellor, President of Pottery Barn, a Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) brand, has reported her initial equity holdings in the company. She holds 36,965 shares of common stock directly and 8 shares indirectly through a 401(k) plan. Additionally, she possesses several restricted stock units (RSUs) which represent contingent rights to receive WSM common stock and will vest between January 25, 2027, and May 17, 2030.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) After 60% One-Year Rally?
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) has seen a significant 60% rally over the past year, prompting an analysis of its current valuation. According to Simply Wall St's Excess Returns model, BNY is currently estimated to be around 4.2% overvalued, with an intrinsic value of US$133.81 per share compared to its recent market price of US$139.43. Additionally, its P/E ratio of 16.73x is slightly above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 15.71x, suggesting it screens as moderately expensive on this metric as well.
